name: The Party From Hell...
description:
A group of girls at a slumber party decide to summon a demon: the demon they summon turns out to be - you!!!

What will you do now you have been summoned...?

(This is my first multi-character scenario, inspired by one I saw on another site but written from scratch. Any issues of AI speaking for you are entirely accidental - I have tried to prevent this in the bot.)
creator: Inigo50
